{{Quote|Departing Endor passenger Sacul, Mister Egroeg Sacul... please see the Star Tours agent at gate number three.|Star Tours public address announcer|<ref name="Star Tours (real-world)">[[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']]</ref>}}
'''Egroeg Sacul''' was a [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency passenger. He was asked to see a Star Tours agent at [[Gate 3|gate number three]] before departing on a [[Endor Express|trip]] to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].<ref name="ST" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character's name is [[George Lucas]]' name spelled backward.<ref name="9 Facts">{{D23|url=9-out-of-this-world-facts-about-star-tours-30-years-of-continued-adventures|text=9 Out of This World Facts about Star Tours' Over 30 Years of Continued Adventures}}</ref>
